The Garmin Xero C2 Chronograph is a compact ballistic chronograph designed to deliver fast, reliable projectile velocity measurements in a wide range of shooting applications. Built for shooters who want convenient setup and dependable performance, it measures speeds up to 5,000 fps, uses simple button-based operation, and offers up to 6 hours of battery life for extended range sessions. Its portable design makes it easy to transport and position, while Bluetooth connectivity and compatibility with the ShotView app help you review sessions, manage shot data, and keep your performance information organized.

column2: >Up to 200 sessions before ShotView app sync is required

vector-optics-continental-riflescope-x6-6-36x56-ffp-prs-rifle-scope-prs,Vector Optics Continental Riflescope - x6 6-36X56 FFP PRS Rifle Scope PRS,"

Item: SCFF-70

The Vector Optics Continental X6 6-36x56 FFP Rifle Scope is a premium precision optic tailored for serious long-range and PRS (Precision Rifle Series) shooters. epic-carbon-fiber-tripod-long-364c,Epic Airguns Carbon Fiber Tripod – Long 364C,"

Product Overview

The engineers at Czech company Epic Airguns understand the importance of high-quality accessories for airguns, which is why they developed tripods that match their airguns in craftsmanship and performance. They have succeeded in creating a series of exclusive EPIC tripods, and we're proud to introduce them.

The adjustable Bowl Head system comes with a quick-release mount compatible with both Picatinny and Arca-Swiss rails. The central grip allows for easy tilting of the head, and with the release of the locking lever, you can rotate it a full 360°. Once you've positioned the tripod at the desired angle, simply secure it by tightening both the locking lever and the central grip.

The Tripod Epic features lightweight yet durable carbon fiber legs. Each leg consists of three segments, and the hinge lock ensures they remain securely in place. Height adjustments are simple, achieved by loosening or tightening the rubber rings. Rubber feet ensure the tripod stays stable on any surface.
One leg includes a rubberized handle at the top and can be unscrewed to be used as a standalone monopod, compatible with a 3/8"" threaded fork.

The tripod is equipped with two bubble levels—one at the base and another on the head. Additionally, a 1/4"" thread on the side of the tripod allows for mounting accessories like a smartphone holder. This model comes with a fabric case, complete with an adjustable shoulder strap for easy transport.

Leg segment diameters:
1st segment: 36mm
2nd segment: 32mm
3rd segment: 28mm
4th segment: 24.5mm
Swivel Head: 360-degree rotation with adjustable Bowl Head system
Monopod Functionality: Detachable leg with rubberized handle
Accessory Mount: 1/4"" thread for smartphone holders or other accessories
• Tripod Epic Airguns 364C with Bowl or Knob Head
• Textile carrying case with adjustable shoulder strap

presslug-cut-lead-wire-cutter,Presslug Cut – Lead Wire Cutter,"

The Presslug Cut is an advanced tool designed for efficiently cutting lead wire into small cylinders, which can then be formed into slugs using the Presslug Press. This eliminates the need for molten lead casting, saving time and effort while ensuring precision.

Manufactured in the Czech Republic using high-tech CNC machining, the Presslug Cut is built for durability and flawless function. It is crafted from EN AW 7075 aluminum alloy with a black anodized finish for strength and longevity. The cutting plate and pellet compartment are made from TOOLOX 44 steel, ensuring precise and consistent cuts.
This latest edition also features a dedicated tray for collecting freshly cut slugs, enhancing convenience and efficiency.
This product is available in 3 different Variants.

The voltage converter is specifically designed to meet the power requirements of the AEA compressor by converting 110 volts to 220 volts. For optimal performance of the AEA compressor, the output side should be set to 220 volts.

In addition to this crucial feature, the converter accepts input voltages of 110/120/220/240 volts AC, with selectable options on the rear panel. It provides 110 volts and 220 to 240 volts AC on the output side, with American and European plugs respectively. This versatility makes it suitable for a wide range of other electrical devices.

Despite its powerful capabilities, the converter remains lightweight at just 2.42kg, making it easy to transport. This makes it an ideal solution for those who need reliable and adaptable voltage conversion.

column1: The Private SA AIR BACKPACK is an ergonomic air carry for field target or hiking with your air rifle. Carry the compact SA Private 2 L tank in our tailored quality back pack together with other necessities. Plenty of room on both sides of the air tank. Many pockets of various sizes.

SA rain cover for the entire back pack included. The tank is secured by an integrated webbing with tension lock and elastic band. The Air backpack will stand by itself when opened and operated as your mobile air station.

It has an anatomical padded back with efficient ventilation and comfortable hip belt for back relief. The padded rear compartment can be used for a hydration system or a laptop. Full front zipper opening allows easy access of the main compartment and the tank. The three modular pockets can hold the smaller accessories, tools, pellets, extra mags etc.
Quick detachable with magnetic Fidlock system and velcro to easily switch between different pre-packed contents. Double straps on both sides to carry a tripod or other gear.
• 3 quick detachable pockets on front panel with magnetic Fidlocks.
• Low tank placement for stability, secured by a webbing and elastic base.
• Bottom with PE board and padding for stability and tank protection.
• Padded compartment for dehydration system or laptop.
• Gap in top for use with air hose or water hose.
• Padded back panels with air flow ventilation, size fits most.
• Ergonomic adjustable hip belt and adjustable chest strap.
• D-rings on shoulder straps to hook up accessories.
• Webbing loops on both sides to carry long items as tripods.
scandinavian-arms-range-bag,Scandinavian Arms Major Range Bag,"<meta charset=""utf-8"">

The Scandinavian Arms RANGE BAG is designed specifically for The Major 6,8 L air tank, but can be used with other similar sized tanks ≈ 7 L. The SA Major Range bag protects the tank while providing comfortable carrying by hand or on the shoulder and enhancing the filling experience since it lies roll free on the table (bench) or stands steadily on the ground beside you.

Open the lid to access the valve and fill your gun. You have two quick detachable pouches for accessories, tools or pellets. It also features a comfortable carry handle and detachable, padded shoulder strap with adjustable length.
Designed to be used in upright position
• Made for 6.8 liter high pressure air tanks (SA Major).
• Durable nylon with synthetic foam padding, bottom with water resistant PU coating.
• Lid opens with a durable oversized YKK zipper with cord puller.
• Spacious side pocket for hose and accessories.
• Detachable and modular pouches with fast magnetic attachment, Fidlock and velcro support.
• Stable plastic feet for use in horizontal position.
• Feet on side for non rolling horisontal position.
• Detachable, padded shoulder strap with adjustable length.
• Designed to be used in steady upright standing position.
• Easy access to tank from top opening.

The Themys 3-12x42 SF Compact is a robust and capable mid power scope, ideal for field target and hunting situations at close to medium ranges. Sporting a one piece maintube made of aircraft grade aluminum, this scope can take any caliber. Its anti reflective coating ensures no light transmission issues when you're aiming, and the etched reticle guarantees a sharp image and reticle contrast. It also features zeroable turrets with push/pull locking systems and diopter correction to match the reticle with your eyesight.

Available with 3 types of reticle: FBR, HFT and 1/2 Mil dot. The HFT reticle is a new unique reticle ideal for field target and hunting at close to medium ranges, allowing the shooter to properly range the target if the kill zone size is known. The result is a versatile scope that allows for quickly properly ranged shots.

aea-airguns-compressor,AEA PCP Air Compressor – 480 BAR/7000 PSI,"

Introducing the AEA PCP Air Compressor, engineered to deliver unmatched pressure capacity for your airgun needs. Certified for use up to an impressive 480 BAR (7000 PSI), this compressor is the best option for PCP airguns and sets a new standard in high-pressure air-filling equipment. Many guns are 350 BAR rated, but not many compressors can get this far. The AEA Compressor does it without breaking a sweat.

With such high operating pressures, the concern about safety is understandable. This is something that AEA took very seriously while developing it, so safety was one of the pillars during the design phase. This portable air compressor features auto stop that prevents overpressure, and also is OIL FREE. This is VERY important while operating at extreme pressure levels!

When purchasing it with the filter, you'll receive all the necessary connectors and adapters for a seamless installation.
• SAFETY FIRST: Auto-stop thanks to electronic pressure sensors and mechanical safety valve - FAIL-SAFE OPERATION.
• OIL FREE: improved safety and ease of maintenance

NOTE: the filter is rated at 310 BAR. If you use the compressor with the filter, don't go over this pressure. If you want to use it over 310 BAR then you will have to use the compressor without the filter.

The Tactical TK3 Bipod is manufactured from the highest quality duralumin, and each part is milled on modern CNC machines for maximum precision and production quality. This bipod stands out for its superior processing, innovative technical solutions and exceptional quality, making it ideal for precise long-range shooting and the most demanding tasks.

The bipod can be easily adjusted in all axes, allowing for precise and stable point adjustment tailored to the needs of the shooter. Its patented horizontal pin locking system ensures that the bipod remains secure, even when shooting with a .50 caliber. The feet feature a 5-step jump ejection system and an innovative H-shaped profile, ensuring extreme durability, torsional rigidity and self-cleaning capabilities.

Fully adjustable, the bipod allows for smooth ""head"" movement and fixation within a range of 20 degrees to the right and left, as well as forward and backward leg movement within a range of 45 and 90 degrees. The legs can extend from 140 to 230 mm (5.511 – 9.055 in), providing precise, consistent and accurate performance necessary for tactical tasks.

Offers the ability to easily switch between Weaver, Arcca-Swiss UIT, M-LOK and KeyMOD rail attachment systems. This versatility allows it to be used on multiple weapons with different rail systems, with changes in less than 20 seconds.

ED stands for ""Extra-low Dispersion"" and refers to the composition and properties of the glass used to build the lenses.
>ED glass is specially formulated, including special compounds that greatly reduce chromatic aberration (not all colors come in the same focal plane) compared to standard lenses.
>In addition to getting rid of color stripes, ED glass ranges also produce sharper images because the stripes are no longer present to soften focus.

This kit includes everything you need for your air tank assembly: backpack, hose, valve, and the tank with its valve. The Private kit features the 2L tank for you to carry on your back, ready to go for that extra air when you’re out there on the hike, looking for targets.

• The Private is a a compact 2L tank designed in Sweden and made in South Korea by the top tank manufacturer. It is made under the highest standards in the industry, ensuring safe carry and operation with compressed air.
    The Private is an ideal tank to carry in your backpack, ready for a quick refill. It will work reliably under any condition and provide you with that extra air volume needed to keep shooting while in the field.

• This Backpack is ideal for carrying your 2.0L Private tank when you're in the field, keeping this large air source right with you. It will also allow you to bring along other essentials for shooting or hiking, all in one backpack, as there is plenty of room in it, and it has three modular pockets to hold them.
    Featuring a rain cover for the entire backpack, this backpack also has an integrated webbing with tension lock and elastic band to secure the tank. It will also stand by itself when opened as you operate is as your mobile air station.
    In terms of ergonomics, it has an anotical padded back with efficient ventilation and also features a hip belt for back relief. You can use the padded rear compartment to carry a laptop or other things, such as a hydration system.
    It also includes a quick detachable with a magnetic Fidlock system and velcro to switch between different pre-packed contents

• The Scandinavian Arms Adjutant Side Bleed valve is SA’s flagship product for their Air Service porducts. It is a Swedish developed and made valve, reliable, compact and smooth to operate. Designed in accordance to the EN ISO 10297 standard.
    This valve features two different gauges: the black dial is for tank pressure and the white dial for fill pressure. It features a burst disc for extra safety and has ergonomic hand wheels, a large main wheel and the smaller bleed wheel.

• Top quality, durable, and reliable hose made by Scandinavian Arms, it is a delight to use and handle. Quick mounted and detached thanks to its Swedish made inox Foster type QD connectors at both ends, it is also partially made in Italy as well under the highest quality standards, providing both safe and reliable use. This hose feels soft to the touch and won’t break, following your bend and twist. Working pressure: 300 BAR /4500 PSI

scandinavian-arms-lrs-scope,Scandinavian Arms LRS Riflescope – 5-25x56 MCR,"

The SA LRS (Limitless Range Scope) stands as a testament to Scandinavian Arms’ commitment to competition-grade performance, born from an elite collaboration with Schmidt &
column2: Bender. Crafted around the renowned 5–25×56 PM II platform, this riflescope delivers unmatched optical clarity, mechanical reliability, and ergonomic precision for shooters pushing boundaries in airgun, .22 LR, and long-range disciplines. With parallax adjustable from 10 m to infinity, glove-friendly turrets, and a signature First Focal Plane Multi Competition Reticle, the SA LRS empowers shooters with rapid, intuitive corrections and stable long-distance tracking. Rugged Scandinavian engineering and competition insights underpin every detail — making the LRS a benchmark optic for serious marksmen worldwide.

column1: • Objective Diameter: 56 mm
• Field of View (100 m): 5.3–1.5 m / 3.0–0.9°
• Exit Pupil: 11.0–2.3 mm
• Eye Relief: 90 mm
• Focal Plane: First Focal Plane (FFP)
• Diopter Adjustment: –3 to +2 dpt
• Parallax Adjustment: 10 m – ∞
• Main Tube Diameter: 34 mm
• Internal Elevation Travel: 340 cm @ 100 m
• Internal Windage Travel: 170 cm @ 100 m
• Turret Configurations: Double‑Turn Elevation (DT) / Single‑Turn Windage (ST)
• Click Value: 0.1 mrad
• Objective thread compatibility: M58.2 × 0.75
• Operating temperature: –25 to +60 °C
• Storage temperature: –55 to +70 °C
• Waterproof depth: 3 m
• Color options: Black / Gold

• The SA LRS is equipped with a specially engineered magnification ring and turrets, featuring larger circumferences and deeper grooves to ensure smooth operation while wearing gloves in any weather, while also enhancing overall ergonomics for everyday use.

• The elevation turret offers a double-turn design, with a second-turn indicator that provides both a tactile and visible signal when entering the second revolution, keeping adjustments precise and intuitive.
• The Zero Stop is set at 1 MRAD (10 clicks) below zero, allowing fine-tuned compensation for factors such as different ammunition types, suppressors, or other offsets.
• With an extraordinary parallax range from 10 m to infinity, the 5–25×56 LRS is perfectly suited for airguns, .22 LR rifles, and long-range precision rifles.

• The First Focal Plane (FFP) Multi Competition Reticle, designed by SA, features a clean open center with a center dot and is optimized to perform consistently throughout the full magnification range, with line thickness increasing as magnification decreases.

• Since 95% of corrections for a well-aimed shot occur within a 2-mrad square (and 80% within a 1-mrad square) of the reticle center, the Multi Competition Reticle includes reference points at each corner of the 2-mrad square, helping shooters make rapid, precise corrections.
• A thin-lined measuring scale is positioned at the top-right of the center, assisting in estimating unknown distance targets during field shooting competitions.

ballistic-chronograph-air-chrony-mk3,Air Chrony MK3 Ballistic Chronograph,"

SKU: mk3b

The Air Chrony MK3 excels in providing exceptionally accurate measurements while maintaining resilience against interference, even in challenging lighting conditions. With a user-friendly interface offering multiple language options and modern features, the Air Chrony MK3 is the chronograph of choice for the diverse community of shooting enthusiasts.
Extensively tested with air rifles, the Air Chrony MK3 also performs reliably with various small-caliber weapons, including airsoft, paintball markers, small-caliber rifles, bows, and crossbows.

The chronograph measures bullet velocity up to 2000 m/s (6,562 fps), energy in Joules, average speed, maximal velocity, minimal velocity, number of shots, velocity deviation, cadence, and more. You can choose between metric or imperial units, and the language can be set directly in the menu.
The MK3 is very durable and can be mounted on a tripod via a standard ¼ UNF thread, making it versatile for almost any circumstance. (Tripod not included)

With excellent accuracy even under poor lighting conditions, USB connection, online results presentation, and intuitive handling, the Air Chrony MK3 is ideal for a wide shooting community. Combined with the appropriate Air Chrony software, it provides outstanding support for accurate shooting.
• Type of connector for external power supply: Micro USB
• Size of the shooting window (W x H x D): 56 x 59 x 75mm / 2.205 x 2.323 x 2.953in

wolfiek-group-one-piece-scope-mounts-34mm,Wolfiek Group One-Piece Scope Mount - 34mm,"

At Wolfiek Group we are convinced of the importance of having a good set of scope rings - even if your optics are top tier, you won’t get the expected results unless you match them with good, quality mounts.

In order to provide mounts that live up to the expectations of the most demanding shooter, we took it upon ourselves to make them. This 30 MOA, one-piece mount is machined to extremely tight tolerances, ensuring superbly smooth surfaces that allow for precise mating between the scope tube and the ring’s base. The separate mount’s pieces are already matched for quick reference and not needing to mark them yourself. Stainless steel crossbolt, base and nut will provide the most reliable hold on your rifle’s rails.
Our Wolfiek group mounts also feature a level for proper scope mounting.

optic-leveler-kit,Riflescope Optic Leveler Kit,"

The Optic Leveler is an easy-to-use tool for leveling scopes mounted in rings or one-piece mounts.

The base plate sits on the Picatinny rail or one-piece mount just below the turret cluster of the scope, and then the matching wedge is inserted from the side. As the 11 degree ramped surfaces of the wedge and base engage, the top of the wedge rises upwards and contacts the turret cluster, automatically leveling it.

This product includes the leveler base and both small and large wedges.

The small wedge requires a space between the rail/mount and turret cluster from 4.83mm (0.19"") to 18.54mm (0.73)"".

The large wedge requires a space between the rail/mount and turret cluster from 17.27mm (0.68"") to 30.48mm (1.2"").

Please note: some one-piece scope mounts may not have enough space, so be certain to check with your specific scope and mount. The leveler requires a flat surface directly below the turret cluster to function.

Directions for use:

1. Place scope in rings or one-piece mount. Tighten rings to remove slack, but leave loose enough that the scope can still be rotated by hand.

2. Place the leveler base on the Picatinny rail or one-piece mount directly below the turret cluster of the scope. The angled slot should be on the top side.

3. Insert the leveler wedge into the slot on the base from the side until it contacts the bottom of the turret cluster.

4. Gently apply pressure to the wedge until the scope rotates and is leveled.

5. Tighten one scope ring according to the torque specifications provided by the ring/mount manufacturer.

6. Remove the optic leveler.

7. Tighten the other ring according to the torque specifications provided by the ring/mount manufacturer.

Use of the this Optic Leveler makes the assumption that the scope's turret cluster and reticle are aligned, which may not be the case with poor quality scopes.

Material: aluminum.

hill-ec-3000-compressor-300-bar-4500-psi,Hill Electric PCP Airgun Air Compressor EC–3000 – 300BAR/4500PSI,"

 PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS COMPRESSOR RUNS ON 220 VOLTS
<div class=""jsx-37044781 diff-row"" role=""row"" data-item-index=""0"" data-known-size=""33"" data-index=""0"" tabindex=""0"">

Hill Pumps is the market leader when it comes to hand pumps for filling your PCP rifle with dry air. With such years of experience, they have built an electrical-powered PCP compressor, designed and manufactured in the UK.

This high-quality air compressor has an adjustable output pressure and an automatic shut-off function. A digital operation display allows you to adjust the output pressure exactly to your wishes. It displays pressure in PSI, Mpa, or BAR. The Hill EC-3000 compressor will stop when it reaches the preset output pressure.

The EC-3000 compressor runs at low RPM, is air-cooled, and is very, very quiet compared to other compressor models. The electronic system protects the system against overheating. When the units reach 75 degrees, it will step into pause mode, and the unit will automatically restart and finish the filling process when it has cooled down.

The unit is lubricated with silicone lube, fed from a small container stored on the right side of the compressor. The crank has its own red oil and oil level indicator.

It takes low maintenance to a whole new level! Almost as low as the 75 dB sound signature the compressor makes while it's running!
• Optional: Inline drying filter. This versatile filter delivers exceptional performance!
• Automated cool down cycle during fills - compressor stops itself and restarts once cooled
• Output hose ends with female quick disconnect fitting
• Displays fill pressure and temperature (in Celcius) during the fill
• THIS PRODUCT IS DESIGNED TO FILL PRE-CHARGED PCP AIR GUNS AND PAINTBALL GUNS. IT CAN ALSO BE USED TO TOP UP SMALL BOTTLES UP TO CA. 4 L.
• Carefully check the crankshaft oil level when the unit is running. On the first use, the level may drop and the oil level needs to be topped up before it remains stable.

• LARGE CYLINDERS/TANKS SHOULD ONLY BE FILLED BY COMPETENT/QUALIFIED PEOPLE. NOT FOLLOWING THE INSTRUCTIONS OR MISUSE OF THE COMPRESSOR WILL VOID YOUR WARRANTY AND MAY RESULT IN DEATH OR INJURY. DANGER OF EXPLOSION.

column2: >WITHIN THE DATE OF USE (BEFORE DATE OF INSPECTION)./AND ARE IN DATE OF INSPECTION.

column1: • TO PROTECT YOURSELF YOU SHOULD ALWAYS WEAR SAFETY GLASSES AND EAR PLUGS WHEN OPERATING THIS COMPRESSOR.
• UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES USE THE HILL EC-3000 ELECTRIC AIR COMPRESSOR TO FILL DIVING CYLINDERS, B/A OR SCBA TANKS THAT ARE TO BE USED FOR BREATHING AIR APPLICATIONS.

The PX-5 is the standard version of the PX-5 family, designed by Effecto to meet the needs of the most demanding PCP users. Available either in .177 or .22 cal, it features a 2-stage trigger with an adjustable weight between 500gr to 750gr. Combined with its high quality 580mm barrel and a Picatinny rail ideal for bipod placement, it allows for a very accurate platform, perfect for the precision shooter. With guaranteed reliability due to its proven bolt action system, the PX-5 comes with a 10-round magazine and a 300CC air tank which provides a great shot count, all of which allow for extended use between refills -making this rifle also ideal for outdoor excursions. The PX-5 achieves all of this while retaining superior ergonomics and a classic and aesthetically pleasing look, with its top-quality Turkish Walnut stock.

Super Lube® O-Ring Silicone Lubricant is a non-curing silicone lubricant ideal for protecting and lubricating O-rings from damage by abrasion, pinching or cutting. It is waterproof and shields against moisture and other contaminants. It also helps to seat the O-ring properly, speeding up assembly operations and improving automated assembly.
Super Lube® O-Ring Silicone Lubricant is clean and clear in appearance. Lubricate the O-ring with Super Lube® O-Ring Silicone to extend the life of the O-Ring.
For rubber and plastic applications see Compatibility Chart under Technical Resources.
Super Lube® O-Ring Silicone Lubricant is an NSF registered Food Grade lubricant, rated H1 for incidental food contact and meets former USDA (H1) guidelines.

Super Lube® O-Ring Silicone Lubricant is Kosher Certified.
